SEARCH
Package gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb

Class DynamoDbRepositoryFactory

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.DynamoDbRepositoryFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
RepositoryFactory
@Configuration @Primary public class DynamoDbRepositoryFactory extends Object implements RepositoryFactory
Creates the necessary Beans for DynamoDB repository access These are the clients that are used to access any DynamoDB repositories
Author:
Audacious Inquiry

    Create the factory for DynamoDb Repositories

  • Constructor Details

    • DynamoDbRepositoryFactory

      public DynamoDbRepositoryFactory(@Autowired software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbEnhancedClient client, @Autowired software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient ddbClient, @Autowired gov.cdc.izgateway.configuration.DynamoDbConfig ddbConfig)
      Create the factory for DynamoDb Repositories
      Parameters:
      client - The Enhanced Client to use to access the repository
      ddbClient - The DynamoDB Client to use
      ddbConfig - The DynamoDB configuration
